title: Dimension Entity
description: Schema for validating dimension.md YAML frontmatter. Dimensions are high-level decompositions of the initial research question using MECE framework.

tags.description: Classification tags including entity type, dimension number, and language

dc:creator.description: Dublin Core creator field - typically 'dimension-planner' skill

dc:title.description: Dublin Core title field - dimension title with number prefix

dc:identifier.description: Dublin Core identifier - unique dimension ID with 8-char hash

dc:created.description: Dublin Core creation timestamp - ISO 8601 format

question_count.description: Number of refined questions in this dimension

mece_validated.description: Whether dimension set is MECE (Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive)

original_organizing_concept.description: Original question's organizing concept (e.g., 'Trends', 'Use Cases', 'Challenges') extracted from initial question. Preserves how the user framed their inquiry.

question_keywords.description: Key phrases extracted from original question that indicate required focus areas (e.g., 'concrete use cases', 'significantly influence', 'business leaders')

impact_prioritization.description: Impact language from original question indicating prioritization level (e.g., 'significantly influence', 'critically affect', 'primarily determine')

target_audience.description: Target audience from original question (e.g., 'business leaders (C-level, Geschäftsführer)', 'technical teams', 'operations managers')

scope_type.description: Scope indicated by original question: 'strategic' (business model innovation), 'operational' (process improvements), or 'mixed'
